Metadata.title: Mediterraneo Solar | Renewable Energy for your Home
Metadata.description: Solar panels in Alicante. Save up to 80% on your bills with Mediterraneo Solar. Installation, maintenance, and legalization of photovoltaic systems.

0.title: Powering the Next Generation.
0.description: The sun is a clean energy source that doesn't pollute our environment and helps you save up to 80% on your bills in the long run.

1.title: Save Up to 80% on Your Bills.
1.description: Our high-efficiency photovoltaic systems are designed to maximize your savings from day one, with a typical ROI in under 5 years.

2.title: A Sustainable Future Starts Here.
2.description: Join thousands of families choosing clean energy. Every panel installed is a step towards a greener, healthier community.

Services.title: Premium Industry Solutions
Services.description: Delivering world-class technological solutions from renowned manufacturers.

solar.title: Solar Panels
solar.description: Installation is very simple, effective and long-lasting.
solar.modalText: We provide top-tier solar panel installations that are both effective and long-lasting. Reduce your electricity bills by up to 80% while increasing your property value. We handle all paperwork, legalization, and maintenance.

hvac.title: HVAC
hvac.modalText: Our HVAC services ensure your home stays comfortable year-round. We install high-efficiency air conditioning and heating systems that are quiet and economical.

electrical.title: Electricity
electrical.modalText: From simple repairs to full property rewiring, our certified electricians offer comprehensive electrical services to keep your home safe and fully operational.

WhyUs.title: Why Mediterraneo Solar?
WhyUs.description: At Mediterraneo Solar we want to take care of you and your home, always maintaining our values and quality standards. We are committed to caring for the environment safely and economically for you and your family.

technical.title: Technical Service
technical.description: Our own technical service. We have total control over the development.

sustainability.title: Sustainability
sustainability.description: High profitability that our equipment brings to your home.

rd.title: R&D Quality
rd.description: Fully satisfactory results in performance, profitability, safety, and aesthetics.

customer.title: Customer Support
customer.description: We also offer advice regarding subsidies, deductions, and aids you wish to process.

fullService.title: 360° Service
fullService.description: All our staff is qualified and industry-certified.

About.title: Excellence in every installation.
About.description: Our certified professionals deliver top-level craftsmanship, passion, and precision to every project—no matter the size.
About.ethics1: Premium materials from leading manufacturers for maximum durability and peak performance.
About.ethics2: Strict adherence to safety protocols and regulatory standards for your peace of mind.
About.ethics3: Continuous support, proactive maintenance, and system monitoring.

GlobalImpact.title: Transforming our community, one panel at a time.
GlobalImpact.description: By choosing Mediterraneo Solar, you are not just saving on bills. You are actively contributing to a cleaner environment, reducing your city's carbon footprint, and helping our region breathe better.

caseStudy.title: Case Study: Alicante Residential Network
caseStudy.description: A growing network of residential installations across the province, achieving massive collective energy savings and drastically lowering the region's reliance on non-renewable grid electricity.

q1.q: What renewable energy solutions do you offer?
q1.a: We are specialists in solar panels, HVAC (air conditioning and heating), and general electrical installations for residential properties.

q2.q: How can I get a quote for a solar installation?
q2.a: Simply fill out our contact form or contact us through WhatsApp. One of our experts will offer you detailed information according to your needs.

q3.q: What are the benefits of switching to renewable energy?
q3.a: Switching to renewables significantly reduces operational costs (saving up to 80% on bills), lowers your carbon footprint, and increases the property value of your infrastructure.

q4.q: Do you handle the legal paperwork and subsidies?
q4.a: Yes, we handle the entire legalization process of the installations and offer advice regarding subsidies, deductions, and aids that you as a client can process.

Contact.title: Contact
Contact.description: Ready to get started? Contact us today.

form.name: Name
form.success: Message sent successfully! We will contact you soon.
form.error: There was an error sending your message. Please try again.

info.title: Contact Information
info.address: Partida Alzabaras Bajo, 1127A, 03290 Elx, Alicante, Spain

Footer.readyDesc: Contact us today for a free consultation and take the first step towards a sustainable future.
Footer.slogan: Your trusted expert partner in photovoltaic and HVAC installations.

Legal.privacyContent: We take your privacy seriously. All personal information collected through our contact forms is used solely for the purpose of communicating with you regarding our services. We do not sell or share your data with third parties.
Legal.privacyIdentidadDesc: The personal data collected on this website will be processed by Mediterraneo Solar, located at Partida Alzabaras Bajo, 1127A, 03290 Elx, Alicante, Spain, and email: info.mediterraneosolar@gmail.com.
Legal.privacyFinalidadDesc: The personal data we collect through our contact forms, or other communication channels, are used exclusively to:
Legal.privacyFinalidadItem2: Send you quotes or information about our solar panel installation, HVAC, and electrical services.
Legal.privacyFinalidadItem3: Manage the commercial relationship in case of contracting.
Legal.privacyConservacionDesc: The data provided will be retained as long as the commercial relationship is maintained, or for the years necessary to comply with legal obligations.
Legal.privacyLegitimacionDesc: The legal basis for the processing of your data is the express consent of the user manifested through the acceptance of this Privacy Policy and the submission of the form.
Legal.privacyDerechosDesc: Anyone has the right to obtain confirmation about whether Mediterraneo Solar is treating personal data that concerns them. You have the right to exercise the following rights:
Legal.privacyDerechosItem1: Right of access, rectification, and deletion of your data.
Legal.privacyDerechosItem2: Right to limitation and opposition to the processing of your data.
Legal.privacyDerechosItem3: Right to portability of your data.
Legal.privacyDerechosContact: You can exercise these rights by sending an email to info.mediterraneosolar@gmail.com.

Legal.noticePropiedadDesc2: The reproduction, distribution, public communication, and transformation, totally or partially, of said contents is expressly prohibited without the express written consent of Mediterraneo Solar.
Legal.noticeGarantiasDesc: Mediterraneo Solar is not responsible, in any case, for damages of any kind that may occur, by way of example: errors or omissions in the contents, lack of availability of the portal or the transmission of viruses or malicious programs in the contents, despite having adopted all necessary technological measures to avoid it.
Legal.noticeModificacionesDesc: Mediterraneo Solar reserves the right to make the modifications it deems appropriate in its portal without prior notice, being able to change, delete, or add both the contents and services provided through it and the way in which they are presented or located in its portal.
